infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to use your camera to analyze waste.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to use your photo library to analyze waste.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to save generated images to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to access your photos to analyze waste.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to access your camera to analyze waste.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to access your media library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Gabes Eco Mobile to save generated images to your gallery.
